source_commit_note: Dispatch should use the merge commit containing the dual-stream physical feasibility estimator and control-plane hook.

requested_items.objective: Check whether the optimistic dual_mac sub-tile attention schedule fits the measured Llama7B logic budget.

expected_result.reason: The result should decide whether dual_mac is physically feasible under the current measured logic budget and quantify the density/area gap if it is not.
